title: Death of Licinius, and Celebration of the Event.

source.title: NPNF2-01. Eusebius Pamphilius: Church History, Life of Constantine, Oration in Praise of Constantine

verses.text: He then proceeded to deal with this adversary of God and his followers according to the laws of war, and consign them to fitting punishment.
Accordingly the tyrant himself, and they whose counsels had supported him in his impiety, were together subjected to the just punishment of death.

After this, those who had so lately been deceived by their vain confidence in false deities, acknowledged with unfeigned sincerity the God of Constantine, and openly professed their belief in him as the true and only God.
